ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "site" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station (e.g., Winnipeg the Forks) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition (e.g., Mostly Cloudy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind direction */,
  "direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the wind direction (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wind direction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station collecting the data */,
  "local_time" TEXT /* Local time at which the data was collected */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "wind_direction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wind direction */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity as a percentage */,
  "feels_like" REAL /* Feels-like temperature in Celsius */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in kPa */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the collected data */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data quality standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_wind_direction_id FOREIGN KEY ("wind_direction_id") REFERENCES wind_directions ("direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES data_quality_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_team_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the forecast */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather forecast being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_access_logs_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES weather_forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the data quality standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality standard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast is made */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition forecasted */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Forecasted temperature in Celsius */,
  "wind_direction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wind direction forecasted */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Forecasted wind speed in km/h */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Forecasted humidity as a percentage */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Forecasted atmospheric pressure in kPa */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_wind_direction_id FOREIGN KEY ("wind_direction_id") REFERENCES wind_directions ("direction_id")
)
